original: The U.S. Postal Service (USPS) continues to bleed red ink.
translation_literal: 美国邮政署继续出现赤字。

original: It reported a net loss of $5.6 billion for fiscal 2016, the 10th straight year its expenses have exceeded revenue.
translation_literal: 它报告 2016 财年净亏损 56 亿美元，这是其支出超过收入的连续第十年。

chunks.english: a net loss of $5.6 billion for fiscal 2016
chunks.chinese: 2016 财年 56 亿美元净亏损

chunks.english: the 10th straight year its expenses have exceeded revenue
chunks.chinese: 其支出超过收入的连续第十年
chunks.relation: 解释 fiscal 2016 的财务意义
省略 when 的定语从句，修饰 year

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 金额亏损 + 同位语说明年份
sentence_patterns.explanation: the 10th straight year... 补充说明亏损的连续性。

original: Meanwhile, it has more than $120 billion in unfunded liabilities, mostly for employee health and retirement costs.
translation_literal: 与此同时，它有超过 1200 亿美元的无资金准备债务，主要是员工医疗和退休成本。

chunks.english: more than $120 billion in unfunded liabilities
chunks.chinese: 超过 1200 亿美元的无资金准备债务

chunks.english: mostly for employee health and retirement costs
chunks.chinese: 主要用于员工医疗和退休成本
chunks.relation: 补充说明 liabilities 的来源

original: There are many reasons this formerly stable federal institution finds itself on the verge of bankruptcy.
translation_literal: 这个曾经稳定的联邦机构发现自己处于破产边缘，有许多原因。

chunks.english: this formerly stable federal institution finds itself on the verge of bankruptcy
chunks.chinese: 这个曾经稳定的联邦机构发现自己处于破产边缘
chunks.relation: 省略 why 的定语从句，修饰 reasons

chunks.chinese: 这个曾经稳定的联邦机构

chunks.relation: 补充说明 itself 的状态

sentence_patterns.explanation: reasons 后省略 why，后面从句解释原因涉及的结果。

original: Fundamentally, the USPS is in a historic squeeze between technological change that has permanently decreased demand for its bread-and-butter product, first-class mail, and a regulatory structure that denies management the flexibility to adjust its operations to the new reality.
translation_literal: 根本上，美国邮政署处在一种历史性挤压之中，一边是技术变革永久性地降低了对其主要产品一等邮件的需求，另一边是监管结构拒绝给予管理层调整运营以适应新现实的灵活性。

chunks.english: in a historic squeeze between technological change and a regulatory structure
chunks.chinese: 处在技术变革和监管结构之间的历史性挤压中

chunks.english: that has permanently decreased demand for its bread-and-butter product, first-class mail
chunks.chinese: 永久性地降低了对其主要产品一等邮件的需求的

chunks.english: demand for its bread-and-butter product, first-class mail
chunks.chinese: 对其主要产品一等邮件的需求

chunks.english: that denies management the flexibility to adjust its operations to the new reality
chunks.chinese: 拒绝给予管理层调整运营以适应新现实的灵活性的

chunks.english: management the flexibility to adjust its operations to the new reality
chunks.chinese: 管理层调整运营以适应新现实的灵活性

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: between A that... and B that...
sentence_patterns.explanation: between 后两个对象各带一个定语从句，是本句主干难点。
first-class mail 解释 bread-and-butter product。

original: And interest groups ranging from postal unions to greeting-card makers exert self-interested pressure on the USPS’s ultimate overseer — Congress — insisting that whatever else happens to the Postal Service, aspects of the status quo they depend on get protected.
translation_literal: 而从邮政工会到贺卡制造商的利益集团，对美国邮政署的最终监督者——国会——施加自利压力，坚持认为无论邮政服务发生什么，它们所依赖的现状方面都要得到保护。

chunks.english: interest groups ranging from postal unions to greeting-card makers
chunks.chinese: 从邮政工会到贺卡制造商的利益集团

chunks.english: ranging from postal unions to greeting-card makers
chunks.chinese: 范围从邮政工会到贺卡制造商的

chunks.english: on the USPS’s ultimate overseer — Congress
chunks.chinese: 对美国邮政署的最终监督者——国会
chunks.relation: 说明 pressure 施加对象

chunks.english: insisting that whatever else happens to the Postal Service, aspects of the status quo they depend on get protected
chunks.chinese: 坚持认为无论邮政服务发生什么，它们所依赖的现状方面都要得到保护
chunks.relation: 补充说明 exert pressure 的内容

chunks.english: that whatever else happens to the Postal Service, aspects of the status quo they depend on get protected
chunks.chinese: 无论邮政服务发生什么，它们所依赖的现状方面都要得到保护

chunks.english: whatever else happens to the Postal Service
chunks.chinese: 无论邮政服务发生什么
chunks.relation: 说明 get protected 的让步条件

chunks.english: aspects of the status quo they depend on
chunks.chinese: 它们所依赖的现状方面
chunks.relation: that 宾语从句主句的主语
省略 that 的定语从句，修饰 status quo
that 宾语从句主句的谓语

sentence_patterns.explanation: 破折号中的 Congress 解释 ultimate overseer。
whatever else happens 表示无论发生什么。

original: This is why repeated attempts at reform legislation have failed in recent years, leaving the Postal Service unable to pay its bills except by deferring vital modernization.
translation_literal: 这就是近年来多次改革立法尝试失败的原因，使邮政服务无法支付账单，只能通过推迟关键现代化来应付。

chunks.english: why repeated attempts at reform legislation have failed in recent years
chunks.chinese: 为什么近年来多次改革立法尝试已经失败

chunks.english: leaving the Postal Service unable to pay its bills except by deferring vital modernization
chunks.chinese: 使邮政服务无法支付账单，只能通过推迟关键现代化来应付

chunks.english: unable to pay its bills except by deferring vital modernization
chunks.chinese: 无法支付账单，只能通过推迟关键现代化
chunks.relation: 补充说明 Postal Service 的状态

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.explanation: why 从句解释原因，leaving 非谓语说明结果。

original: Now comes word that everyone involved — Democrats, Republicans, the Postal Service, the unions and the system’s heaviest users — has finally agreed on a plan to fix the system.
translation_literal: 现在传来消息：所有相关方——民主党人、共和党人、邮政服务、工会以及该系统最重度用户——终于就修复该系统的计划达成了一致。

chunks.english: that everyone involved — Democrats, Republicans, the Postal Service, the unions and the system’s heaviest users — has finally agreed on a plan to fix the system
chunks.chinese: 所有相关方终于就修复该系统的计划达成一致
chunks.relation: 解释 word 的具体内容

chunks.english: Democrats, Republicans, the Postal Service, the unions and the system’s heaviest users
chunks.chinese: 民主党人、共和党人、邮政服务、工会以及该系统最重度用户
chunks.relation: 列举 everyone involved 的范围

chunks.english: a plan to fix the system
chunks.relation: 作 agreed on 的宾语

sentence_patterns.explanation: 状语 Now 置于句首引出倒装，主语是 word。
that 从句解释传来的消息内容。

original: Legislation is moving through the House that would save USPS an estimated $28.6 billion over five years, which could help pay for new vehicles, among other survival measures.
translation_literal: 一项立法正在众议院推进，它将在五年内为美国邮政署节省估计 286 亿美元，这可能有助于支付新车辆等生存措施。

chunks.english: that would save USPS an estimated $28.6 billion over five years
chunks.chinese: 将在五年内为 USPS 节省估计 286 亿美元的
为 USPS 估计 286 亿美元

chunks.english: which could help pay for new vehicles, among other survival measures
chunks.chinese: 这可能有助于支付新车辆等生存措施
chunks.relation: 指代前面节省资金这件事
作 pay for 的宾语
补充说明 new vehicles 属于 survival measures

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主句 + that 从句 + which 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句修饰 Legislation，which 从句指代节省资金的作用。

original: Most of the money would come from a penny-per-letter permanent rate increase and from shifting postal retirees into Medicare.
translation_literal: 大部分资金将来自每封信一美分的永久费率上涨，以及把邮政退休人员转入医保。

chunks.chinese: 每封信一美分的永久费率上涨
把邮政退休人员转入医保

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: come from A and from B
sentence_patterns.explanation: 资金来源有两个并列部分。

original: The latter step would largely offset the financial burden of annually pre-funding retiree health care, thus addressing a long-standing complaint by the USPS and its unions.
translation_literal: 后一步将在很大程度上抵消每年预先为退休人员医疗保健筹资的财务负担，从而回应美国邮政署及其工会长期以来的抱怨。

chunks.english: the financial burden of annually pre-funding retiree health care
chunks.chinese: 每年预先为退休人员医疗保健筹资的财务负担

chunks.english: of annually pre-funding retiree health care
chunks.chinese: 每年预先为退休人员医疗保健筹资的

chunks.english: thus addressing a long-standing complaint by the USPS and its unions
chunks.chinese: 从而回应 USPS 及其工会长期以来的抱怨

chunks.english: a long-standing complaint by the USPS and its unions
chunks.chinese: USPS 及其工会长期以来的抱怨

key_phrases.meaning: 预先为退休人员医疗保健筹资

original: If it clears the House, this measure would still have to get through the Senate — where someone is bound to point out that it amounts to the bare, bare minimum necessary to keep the Postal Service afloat, not comprehensive reform.
translation_literal: 如果它通过众议院，这项措施仍然必须通过参议院——在那里必定有人指出，它只是维持邮政服务运转所必需的最低最低限度，而不是全面改革。

chunks.relation: if 从句内部主语，指 measure

chunks.english: would still have to get through

chunks.relation: 作 get through 的宾语

chunks.english: where someone is bound to point out that it amounts to the bare, bare minimum necessary to keep the Postal Service afloat, not comprehensive reform
chunks.chinese: 在那里必定有人指出它只是维持邮政服务运转所必需的最低限度，而不是全面改革

chunks.english: that it amounts to the bare, bare minimum necessary to keep the Postal Service afloat, not comprehensive reform
chunks.chinese: 它只是维持邮政服务运转所必需的最低限度，而不是全面改革
chunks.relation: 作 point out 的宾语

chunks.english: the bare, bare minimum necessary to keep the Postal Service afloat
chunks.chinese: 维持邮政服务运转所必需的最低限度
chunks.relation: 作 amounts to 的宾语

sentence_patterns.pattern_name: 分裂结构 / 间隔结构
sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 条件从句 + 主句 + where 从句 + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: 破折号后的 where 从句中又嵌入 point out 的宾语从句。

original: There’s no change to collective bargaining at the USPS, a major omission considering that personnel accounts for 80 percent of the agency’s costs.
translation_literal: 美国邮政署的集体谈判没有任何改变；考虑到人员占该机构成本的 80%，这是一个重大遗漏。

chunks.english: There’s no change to collective bargaining at the USPS
chunks.chinese: USPS 的集体谈判没有任何改变

chunks.english: no change to collective bargaining at the USPS
chunks.chinese: USPS 的集体谈判没有改变
chunks.relation: there be 结构真实主语

chunks.english: a major omission considering that personnel accounts for 80 percent of the agency’s costs
chunks.chinese: 一个重大遗漏，考虑到人员占该机构成本的 80%
chunks.relation: 解释 no change 的性质

chunks.english: considering that personnel accounts for 80 percent of the agency’s costs
chunks.chinese: 考虑到人员占该机构成本的 80%
chunks.relation: 说明为什么是 major omission

chunks.english: that personnel accounts for 80 percent of the agency’s costs

chunks.relation: 作 accounts for 的宾语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 前句事实 + 同位语评价
sentence_patterns.explanation: a major omission 对 no change 作评价说明。

original: Also missing is any discussion of eliminating Saturday letter delivery.
translation_literal: 同样缺失的是任何关于取消周六信件投递的讨论。

chunks.english: Also missing is any discussion of eliminating Saturday letter delivery
chunks.chinese: 同样缺失的是任何关于取消周六信件投递的讨论

chunks.english: any discussion of eliminating Saturday letter delivery
chunks.chinese: 任何关于取消周六信件投递的讨论

sentence_patterns.explanation: 表语 Also missing 置于句首，强调另一项缺失。

original: That common-sense change enjoys wide public support and would save the USPS $2 billion per year.
translation_literal: 那项合乎常识的改变享有广泛公众支持，并且每年将为 USPS 节省 20 亿美元。

sentence_patterns.explanation: 两个谓语并列说明取消周六投递的优势。

original: But postal special-interest groups seem to have killed it, at least in the House.
translation_literal: 但是邮政特殊利益集团似乎已经扼杀了它，至少在众议院是这样。

chunks.relation: 作 killed 的宾语，指取消周六投递

original: The emerging consensus around the bill is a sign that legislators are getting frightened about a politically embarrassing short-term collapse at the USPS.
translation_literal: 围绕该法案正在形成的共识是一个迹象，表明立法者正对 USPS 发生政治上令人尴尬的短期崩溃感到害怕。

chunks.english: The emerging consensus around the bill
chunks.chinese: 围绕该法案正在形成的共识

chunks.english: that legislators are getting frightened about a politically embarrassing short-term collapse at the USPS
chunks.chinese: 立法者正对 USPS 发生政治上令人尴尬的短期崩溃感到害怕

chunks.english: about a politically embarrassing short-term collapse at the USPS
chunks.chinese: 对 USPS 发生政治上令人尴尬的短期崩溃

sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句解释 sign 表明了什么。

original: It is not, however, a sign that they’re getting serious about transforming the postal system for the 21st century.
translation_literal: 然而，这并不是一个表明他们正在认真对待为 21 世纪改造邮政系统的迹象。

chunks.english: a sign that they’re getting serious about transforming the postal system for the 21st century
chunks.chinese: 一个表明他们正在认真对待为 21 世纪改造邮政系统的迹象
chunks.relation: 作 is not 的表语

chunks.english: that they’re getting serious about transforming the postal system for the 21st century
chunks.chinese: 他们正在认真对待为 21 世纪改造邮政系统

chunks.english: serious about transforming the postal system for the 21st century
chunks.chinese: 认真对待为 21 世纪改造邮政系统
chunks.relation: 作 are getting 的表语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主语 + 谓语 + however + 表语
sentence_patterns.explanation: however 插在谓语和表语之间，提示与上一句形成转折。
